title: Fulfillment Option Base
description: Common base for a fulfillment option: an addressable, renderable choice (e.g. Standard, Express). Catalog uses this base directly; checkout composes it with cost and timing.

id.description: Unique identifier for this fulfillment option.

title.description: Short label that distinguishes this option from its siblings (e.g. 'Standard', 'Express Shipping', 'Curbside Pickup').

description.description: Supplementary context for the title (e.g. 'Arrives in 4 business days', 'Arrives Dec 12-15 via FedEx'). Directly renderable; MUST NOT repeat the title.
